label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16

extraction.one_line_summary: JACOBSEN Fabio won sprint after UAE Emirates' pace attacks on rolling terrain forced De Koenig to expend resources bridging him back.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates pre-positioned attacks on undulating terrain specifically targeting Jacobsen's green jersey, forcing De Koenig defensive expenditure before finale.
De Koenig placed two riders in six-man break as insurance policy while defending green jersey behind.
Van Hulk bridged from peloton to breakaway at 1:23 gap, indicating Lotto Soudal read UAE's tempo wouldn't sustain break threat.
Technical finale with dropped chains suggests over-geared sprinters unprepared for sharp gradients inside 5km.

rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: positive: survived UAE-orchestrated attacks on climbs and regrouped, then finished sprint without full leadout train
rider_signals.CERMAK Joe: positive: De Koenig's last leadout man inadvertently set up rivals, showing team depth depleted by earlier bridging effort
rider_signals.KRIEGER Alex: negative: believed Modolo on wheel for leadout but lost spatial awareness, wasting positioning
rider_signals.BOL John: negative: carried visible cuts throughout stage after major crash, indicating reduced team support capacity
